<compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-request-id-dynamic/input.js:4:41: SLOPPYC_E_UNSUPPORTED_REQUEST_ID: RequestId generator callbacks are unsupported in compiler source input
  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-request-id-dynamic/input.js:4:41
   |
4 | app.use(RequestId.defaults({ generator: () => "req-1" }));
   |                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^
hint: Use static RequestId options in compiler input; generator callbacks remain an app-host test helper.
